turns.user_message: I think I've become numb to everything. I just don't feel much of anything anymore.
This numbness has been sticking around for weeks now. I can't seem to shake it off no matter what I do.
I'm starting to wonder if I should talk to someone about this emptiness. It just won't go away.

generation_metadata.diversity_anchor: The speaker opens with a conclusion they've reached about themselves.
